case_title: JOANNA THEIL VS. SANJIV PATEL et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 - SERVED JAN-13-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RED HAWK HOSPITALITY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-19-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $225/MONTH, WITH THE FIRST PAYMENT ON MAY 28, 2012 WITH PAYMENT DUE ON THE 28TH DAY OF EACH MONTH UNTIL THE FULL AMOUNT OF $5,395.00 PLUS ANNUAL INTEREST AT 10% ON THE UNPAID BALANCE IS PAID. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS PROVIDE NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF ANY POSSIBLE DELAY IN ANY MONTHLY PAYMENT BY THE 20TH DAY OF THAT MONTH", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 95.00 - SERVED JAN-13-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, SANJIV

REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR ON NOV-19-2012 IN DEPT. 506 -CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 5/14/12. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AMANDA FISCHER. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,926.00 FILED BY THEIL, JOANNA AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, SANJIV RED HAWK HOSPITALITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 119.00 - SERVED JAN-21-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, SANJIV
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 - SERVED JAN-21-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RED HAWK HOSPITALITY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THEIL, JOANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL, SANJIV RED HAWK HOSPITALITY $5,395.00 PRINCIPAL, $409.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,804.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, SANJIV HEARING SET FOR MAY-14-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
